use_cases: Creating animated gradient headings on landing pages to capture attention
Adding dynamic visual interest to hero sections without heavy graphics
Enhancing call-to-action text with colorful animated gradient backgrounds
Styling feature highlights with ambient gradient animations
Creating eye-catching labels or badges with animated gradient orbs
ai_summary: A lightweight animated text component that overlays four continuously moving gradient orbs behind text content, using CSS mix-blend-modes and blur effects to create a smooth, dynamic gradient appearance. The animation runs automatically without user interaction, making it ideal for adding visual polish to headings, CTAs, and branding elements.
